extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI Vincenzo counter-attacked on descent after FROOME Chris attacked Alto de la Comella, winning from select group after Sky's tempo shattered field.
tactical_patterns: FROOME Chris attacked final climb then immediately used descent tactic transplanted from Tour, forcing selection before regrouping.
Team Sky paced final ascent at tempo high enough to distance CONTADOR Alberto 2.5+ minutes despite no summit finish.
NIBALI Vincenzo positioned conservatively on climb then exploited regrouping descent chaos, launching late counter-attack from behind chasers.
Early break with DE GENDT Thomas absorbed exactly at climb base after Sky's 40km chase, timing denial of recovery.

rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Lost 2:30+ on first mountain stage despite modest gradients, abandoned GC ambitions by stage 3.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: Seized race lead via descent attack tactic, strong enough to force selection despite regrouping.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Struggled on climb but tactical acumen on descent superior, won from vulnerable position.
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: Only rider following FROOME's descent acceleration, showed comparable descending aggression.
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: Second place and Team Sky's tactical depth allows podium position while FROOME takes leadership burden.
